content.speakerText: Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?

options.text: Not bad! Just swamped with work, but I’m hanging in there.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体细节（忙于工作）和自然表达（hanging in there），符合寒暄中鼓励分享细节的要求。'Fine, thanks.' 虽语法正确，但过于简单，不符合教学目标。'I don't know' 和 'Why do you ask?' 不符合社交语境，显得冷漠或回避。

content.speakerText: You look great! Did you get a haircut?
content.speakerTextCn: 你看起来气色真好！是剪头发了吗？

options.text: Yes, I went to the salon last week.
Thanks! Yeah, I finally went to that new barbershop downtown.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅接受了赞美，还补充了具体细节（新理发店），语气轻松自然。'Yes, I went to the salon last week.' 虽然正确，但缺乏个性和生动性。'I didn't notice' 回应不当，'I guess so' 过于模糊，缺乏热情。

options.text: Pretty good! I started a new hobby—painting. It’s been really relaxing.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体细节（新爱好：绘画）并表达了感受，符合寒暄中拉近距离的教学目标。'Good. You?' 虽常见，但过于简短，缺乏互动深度。'Could you repeat that?' 不合语境。'I’m fine. Nothing special.' 抑制了对话积极性，不符合鼓励分享的原则。

content.template: I've been ___ with work, but I’m hanging in there.
content.hint: 表示‘忙得不可开交’的地道表达
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（swamped with work）

content.hint: 回应外貌赞美时，用‘光线好’来幽默解释

content.template: I just got back from a trip to ___!
content.hint: 分享近期经历时，常用国家/城市作为具体细节
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心句型（分享旅行经历）

content.speakerText: Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?
expectedAnswers: Not bad! I’ve been working late every night, but I finally started yoga to unwind.
Pretty good! I adopted a cat last month—she’s adorable!
Same old, just juggling a few projects. How about you?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的关心并主动分享近况
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达，如 hanging in there, just juggling 等
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个具体细节（如工作、宠物、爱好）

content.speakerText: You look great! Did you get a haircut?
content.speakerTextCn: 你看起来气色真好！是剪头发了吗？
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I actually just got a new lamp at home—better lighting makes all the difference!
Haha, nope—coffee and sleep did the trick!
Maybe? I think I just needed a good night’s rest. Thanks for noticing!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌接受赞美并用轻松方式回应
语言准确性：语法和用词是否符合口语习惯
表达自然度：是否使用幽默、自嘲或轻松语气（如 'did the trick', 'maybe?'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'haha', 或类似语气词体现轻松感

content.speakerText: Hi! How’s life treating you these days?
expectedAnswers: Pretty well! I’ve been trying out new recipes—last week I made ramen from scratch!
Could be better—I’ve been sick, but I’m on the mend now.
Same as always, just working and binge-watching Netflix. You?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了开放式问候并提供个人近况
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当时态和口语结构（如 'been trying', 'on the mend'）
表达自然度：是否使用了生活化表达，避免机械式 'I'm fine'
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个具体事件或感受细节
